/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic CMakeFiles/rdkafka_consumer.dir/consumer_librdkafka.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rdkafka_consumer.dir/database_writer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rdkafka_consumer.dir/main.cpp.o -o rdkafka_consumer  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/lib64/libpq.so /usr/lib64/libcurl.so /usr/local/lib/librdkafka.so /usr/local/lib/librdkafka++.so /usr/lib64/libjsoncpp.so.1.9.5
